style_effects: Flickering translucent violet mist particles drift slowly around Mr. Mime's form, elongating shadows bending unnaturally at sharp angles. A soft, eerie purple aura pulses gently around its body with a faint, distorted reflection shimmering in the air. Cool, pale blue moonlight casts long, wavering shadows that twist like smoke, creating an unsettling yet elegant atmosphere. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
